title: Subitem Templates App & Unlimited Subitems App
excerpt:
Hi All, 
Looking to see if there’s a way to utilize the subitem templates app with the unlimited subitems app? Trying to create a template that can be applied to an item that has several layers of subitems. Thank you

posts.author: Sarah3723 (Sarah Stone )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Looking to see if there’s a way to utilize the subitem templates app with the unlimited subitems app? Trying to create a template that can be applied to an item that has several layers of subitems. Thank you

posts.author: Yaiza (Yaiza Sanz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

My name is Yaiza and I am the product manager of Unlimited Subitems. Unfortunately there is currently no way to combine both apps as the app “Subitem templates” does not support the creation of these subtask templates for subitems, only for items.

Please let me know if I can help you with anything else.

Kind regards,
Yaiza

posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

A solution to what you are trying to achieve is Subitems Pro Template app. Speaking from my own experience, I found it to be genuinely helpful.

posts.author: _Netto_Marcus (Marcus Netto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kessi,
Hope you are well,
So you were able to save Subitems and the “sub-subitems” as a template using the Subitems Pro app? Do you mind elaborating on this as I have tried it myself and cannot seem to get it to work.
Thanks in advance,
Marcus
